title: Fears over food shortages in Tehran as residents worry about length of war
description: Locals tell BBC Persian they are worried about the availability of groceries and price increases as strikes continue to hit the capital.
content:
People in Tehran are stocking up on essentials as uncertainty over how long the war might continue grows in the Iranian capital.

title: Iran war: What has been hit so far - and the military assets in play
description: Sky News delves into where the strikes and counter-strikes have struck - and the military assets available to both sides.
content:
The US and Israel have carried out strikes on Iran for a fourth day after launching an operation which killed its supreme leader.

title: 'Radio silence' after Etihad Airways flights to London cancelled
description: Yasmin Rufo's connecting flight to Abu Dhabi was cancelled and she remains stranded in Sri Lanka.
content:
A Londoner stranded in Sri Lanka says she is watching the cost of her holiday spiral after her flight home was cancelled, leaving her unsure when she will be able to return as conflict in the Middle East forces widespread airspace closures.

title: Too early to tell scope of Iran strikes, Trump tells Congress
description: But lawmakers say they are unclear about Trump's plans after receiving a classified briefing from officials.
content:
President Donald Trump has told lawmakers it is not yet possible to know the "full scope and duration" of US strikes on Iran.
